items.title: Taiwan drone exports to Europe soar 40-fold as Ukraine war fuels demand
Middle East crisis live: US and Iran in blockade stalemate as Washington’s navy secretary leaves office ‘immediately’
items.description: Iran says two seized ships transferred to its coast; US navy secretary exiting post ‘effective immediately’, says Pentagon‘Impossible’ to reopen strait of Hormuz amid ‘flagrant’ ceasefire breaches, Iran saysThe Israel Defense Forces (IDF) said its troops have captured a member of Hezbollah’s Radwan force, the most elit…

items.title: Lebanon accuses Israel of targeting journalist killed in air strike
items.description: Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes after IDF attacks on Red Cross vehicles also stopped rescuers from reaching the site.

items.title: Middle East war live: Lebanon meets Israel in Washington to request truce extension
items.description: Israel and Lebanon hold a new round of talks in Washington on Thursday, during which Beirut plans to request a one-month extension of a ceasefire due to expire within days. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

items.title: Palestinian man shot dead in settler attack on West Bank town near Ramallah
items.description: IDF confirms settler raid in Deir Dibwan, stresses troops didn't fire any shots at local Palestinians; soldiers hand over Israeli suspects to cops, who launch probe, but no arrests made The post Palestinian man shot dead in settler attack on West Bank town near Ramallah appeared first on The Times of Israel.

items.title: Sexual violence in the West Bank emerges as tool to intimidate Palestinians
items.description: Systematic sexual violence and harassment by Israeli soldiers, settlers displacing Palestinians in occupied West Bank.

items.title: Casa Bianca, non c'è una scadenza tassativa per Iran, decide Trump sulla tregua
items.description: Leavitt, inesatta l'ipotesi di '3-5 giorni' di cessate il fuoco

items.title: Ukraine's military chaplains bear witness to the hell of the front lines: 'Everyone started to believe in God after the first bombing'
items.description: Tested by four years of full-scale war, soldiers have found invaluable moral support from military chaplains. Faced with death and destruction on a daily basis, more and more of them have been seeking the presence of priests.

items.title: EU unblocks €90 billion loan to Ukraine
items.description: Envoys from EU member states have finally paved the way for a €90 billion loan to Ukraine that had long been blocked by Hungary. They also approved a 20th package of sanctions on Russia over its invasion of its neighbor.

items.title: SECURITY COUNCIL LIVE: Regional war threatens Syria’s fragile transition
items.description: The Security Council is meeting now at a critical juncture for Syria’s fragile transition. While the Iran-US ceasefire has temporarily eased regional spillover from Lebanon and elsewhere, conditions remain volatile in Syria. The reported US military withdrawal now completed, marks a milestone, yet the chamber faces a c…

items.title: Iran says it seized ships in Strait of Hormuz as U.S. blockade continues amid ceasefire
items.description: Three vessels came under fire in the Strait of Hormuz, after the U.S. and Iran failed to meet in Pakistan for talks to end the war and as President Trump extended the ceasefire but kept the blockade.

items.title: Woman and Child Killed in Ukrainian Drone Strike on Samara Region
items.description: Ukraine previously attacked an oil refinery in the city of Syzran, where a woman and a child were killed early Wednesday.

items.title: On Ukraine's 'Road of Life,' Drones Hunt Targets Near The Front Line
items.description: Ukrainian soldiers patrol near Druzhkivka as Russian drone and air strikes intensify. Along the "Road of Life" to Kostyantynivka -- a vital but deadly route -- soldiers hunt drones while civilians who remain say they have nowhere else to go.

items.title: EXCLUSIVE: Are Robots Replacing Soldiers in Ukraine War? What’s Really Happening on the Front Line
items.description: Ukrainian troops say ground robots are rapidly expanding on the front line to deliver supplies and evacuate wounded, reducing risks for soldiers but not replacing them.

items.title: Amid ceasefire in Lebanon, a rush home – if it’s reachable and still there
items.description: As civilians displaced by the Israel-Hezbollah conflict in Lebanon try to return to their war-damaged homes, a new Israeli occupation zone in the country’s south poses an obstacle for many. Meanwhile, the ceasefire has reduced but not eliminated the fighting.
